_comment: Example action list for resolve_bridge.py. Export from resolve_studio.html, or hand-edit. Actions execute in order; each action is independent. Resolve must be running.

_actions.ensure_project: create or switch to a project. project: 'MM_vol5_major_arcana' etc.
_actions.import_from_runway_manifest: read a Runway manifest, import all SUCCEEDED entries into bins under bin_prefix/tag. project + manifest + bin_prefix.
_actions.import_files: import a specific list of paths into a specific bin. project + bin + files + optional metadata.
_actions.timeline_from_manifest: build a timeline from manifest entries in order. project + manifest + name + framerate + optional order ('manifest'|'submitted_at') + optional tag_filter.
_actions.set_metadata: write description/keywords/notes onto a specific clip. project + clip (filename) + description? + keywords? + notes?
_actions.sync_metadata_out: PULL markers/comments/flag_color FROM Resolve BACK INTO the manifest, under a resolve.* subkey. project + manifest + optional output. This is the action that closes the loop — the rest of the deck's tooling reads the synced manifest to know which Runway clips have been graded/approved.
